title: Sensitivity Analysis: What is the main purpose of sensitivity analysis in financial...
summary: Assess how sensitivity analysis evaluates the impact of changing assumptions on financial outcomes.
prompt: What is the main purpose of sensitivity analysis in financial forecasting?

options.text: Sensitivity analysis is primarily used to evaluate how changes in key

solution: Sensitivity analysis is primarily used to evaluate how changes in key assumptions or inputs affect the outcomes of financial models, allowing analysts to understand the risks associated with their forecasts.
